allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv\('clean_full_data_v2.csv', usecols=['stay_id','charttime','SpO2','PEEP','FiO2','TidalVol','HR','MAP','RespRate'], nrows=200000\); print\('rows:', len\(df\)\); print\('cols:', list\(df.columns\)\); print\('unique stays in sample:', df['stay_id'].nunique\(\)\); g = df.groupby\('stay_id'\).size\(\); print\('rows-per-stay \(sample\) min/median/max:', int\(g.min\(\)\), int\(g.median\(\)\), int\(g.max\(\)\)\)")
